title: UI: server health indicator — show disconnected state when server is unreachable
Fix message delivery checkmarks: thicker strokes, bottom-right fixed position
close_reason: Done — checkmarks now use thicker strokes (font-weight 900 + webkit-text-stroke) and are fixed-position bottom-right of chat area instead of inline

title: Tool call display modes: Minimal, Normal, Full
description:
Goal: Three display modes for tool calls in chat view.

Mode 1 - Minimal: Only show tools that change state (Edit, Write, Bash with side effects). Hide read-only tools (Read, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, WebSearch). Bash is ambiguous - inspect command for read-only patterns (ls, cat, grep, git status) vs mutation (git commit, npm install, rm). When in doubt, show it.

Mode 2 - Normal (DEFAULT): All tool calls visible but collapsed (tool name + file/command summary in one line). Click to expand.

Mode 3 - Full: Everything fully expanded. Current behavior, for debugging.

UI: Three-way toggle or dropdown in chat settings. Persisted per-workspace in localStorage. Mode change applies retroactively (re-renders existing messages).

Safety: Do NOT change tool event persistence - rendering only. Default to Normal.
